sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Villarreal shows strong form with 3 wins and 1 draw in their last 5 matches, scoring consistently. Athletic Club, however, is struggling with no wins in their last 5 matches, managing only 1 draw and conceding in every game.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two encounters, results are mixed with a 0-0 draw at Villarreal and a 2-0 win for Athletic Club at home. Matches between these teams often see low-scoring outcomes.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Villarreal ranks high in goals scored (12, 4th) and defensively (5 conceded, 2nd). Athletic Club has scored fewer (7) and struggles defensively, conceding 7 goals this season.

sections.subtitle: Tactical Insights
sections.text: Villarreal's ability to create big chances (21, 3rd) and high pressing (4th in final third possessions) could exploit Athletic Club's defensive vulnerabilities. Athletic Club's poor finishing and recent inability to score might hinder their chances.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: The first half between Villarreal and Athletic Club at Estadio de la Ceramica ended in a goalless draw, with both teams creating opportunities but failing to convert. Neither side managed to break the deadlock despite several promising moments. The game remains finely balanced as we head into the second half.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance breakdown
halftimeSections.text: Athletic Club dominated possession and showed more intent in the attacking third, frequently entering the final areas of the pitch and creating dangerous situations. Their ability to penetrate Villarreal’s defense was evident, though they lacked the finishing touch. Villarreal, on the other hand, were more conservative but still fashioned notable chances, especially through set pieces and quick transitions. Their defense held firm under pressure, while their aerial dominance provided a slight edge in physical battles.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key player contributions
halftimeSections.text: For Villarreal, Nicolas Pépé stood out with his attacking intent, creating opportunities and posing a threat in front of goal. His involvement in key moments suggests he could be pivotal in the second half. On the Athletic Club side, Oihan Sancet was a constant danger, getting into scoring positions but missing crucial chances. Gorka Guruzeta also showed promise with his positioning and efforts on target, potentially setting the tone for a breakthrough after the break.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum analysis
halftimeSections.text: The first half saw fluctuating momentum, with Villarreal starting brightly by pushing forward in the opening stages and creating sustained pressure early on. However, Athletic Club gradually took control, showing consistent attacking spells through the middle and latter parts of the half, often overwhelming Villarreal’s backline. While Villarreal had brief moments of resurgence, particularly around the half-hour mark, Athletic Club largely dictated the tempo with prolonged periods of attacking intent.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Tactical observations
halftimeSections.text: Villarreal seemed content to absorb pressure and hit on the counter, relying on quick wing play to exploit spaces. Their defensive organization has been solid, though they struggled with Athletic Club’s relentless entries into dangerous areas. Athletic Club, conversely, played with a high-pressing game and focused on overloading the final third, but their inability to convert big chances could be a concern. Both managers might look to tweak their approaches in the second half to capitalize on the openings seen so far.
